_comment: PLACEHOLDER — model_dir below is a '/path/to/...' dummy value and is NOT real; you MUST change it to the folder llama.cpp/llama-swap loads GGUFs from (must match the '-m' paths in your llama-swap config). repo_id values are also placeholders — fill them only if you want the in-app downloader (the Hugging Face repo hosting each .gguf); leave them if the files already exist in model_dir. filenames are taken from the llama-swap config. Test models and GLM5.2 were left out on purpose.
